overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA IV showing the protagonist Niko Bellic walking through the Steinway Park area of Liberty City. The character transitions from a park entrance onto urban sidewalks, crosses a street with moderate traffic, and continues up an inclined residential street lined with brick brownstones and trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: park entrance transitioning to urban sidewalk

events.description: character exits Steinway Park paved area onto concrete sidewalk next to stone wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily from park entrance onto the sidewalk alongside a stone wall

entered.detail: green park sign with white text reading 'STEINWAY PARK' mounted on metal frame
tall gray stone wall running parallel to the sidewalk
large bridge tower visible in the distance against the skyline
yellow school bus parked or moving slowly along the street
row of dark brown brick brownstone buildings with multiple stories

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at the entrance to Steinway Park, with a green park sign visible on the right. The character walks along a paved path lined with trees before transitioning onto a concrete sidewalk next to a tall stone wall. In the distance, a suspension bridge tower is visible, while brick apartment buildings line the left side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban residential sidewalk with street parking

events.description: yellow school bus drives past from left to right along the street
yellow taxi cab passes by on the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk passing by parked cars and trees

notable_agents.action: school bus driving along the street in the same direction as the character

entered.detail: mature deciduous trees with green foliage lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk bordered by a stone wall on the right and brick apartment buildings on the left. A yellow school bus passes by on the street, followed later by a taxi. Street trees provide intermittent shade as the character continues along the residential street.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching intersection with multi-story parking structure

events.description: approaching crosswalk with traffic light visible ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along sidewalk approaching an intersection with a large yellow building ahead

entered.detail: large multi-story yellow and red industrial building with grid-like window patterns
traffic signal pole at the upcoming intersection
white striped pedestrian crossing visible ahead on the street

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the sidewalk as a large yellow parking garage building comes into view ahead. The street remains lined with brick buildings and trees. As the character approaches the intersection, a traffic light and crosswalk become visible, with the suspension bridge now visible to the right.

events.description: character stops at crosswalk edge waiting for yellow taxi to pass
character begins crossing the street at the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk for traffic to clear, then crossing the street while a woman in black dress runs across from the right

notable_agents.action: woman in black dress and red shoes running across the crosswalk from right to left
yellow taxi cab driving through the intersection

entered.detail: vintage gray sedan driving through the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the intersection and stops at the crosswalk to wait for a yellow taxi to pass. A woman in a black dress runs across the crosswalk from the right. After the traffic clears, the character begins crossing the street, with the yellow parking garage building now visible on the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: inclined residential street with brick walls

events.description: character begins ascending the inclined sidewalk up the hill

agents.ego_description: walking uphill along the inclined sidewalk next to a brick wall with graffiti

entered.detail: red brick industrial building with orange graffiti tags on the lower wall
elevated highway or train overpass visible at the top of the hill

segments.scene_description: After crossing the street, the character walks up a steeply inclined sidewalk alongside a brick building covered in graffiti. The street becomes narrower and more enclosed, with an overpass visible in the distance at the top of the hill. The area appears quieter with no visible traffic or pedestrians.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the open greenery of a park entrance into a dense, inclined urban residential area. It begins at the entrance to Steinway Park by a green sign, moving along a paved path and past a tall stone wall with a distant suspension bridge tower visible above the brick apartment buildings. As the character continues along the sidewalk, the scene shifts through a residential stretch where a yellow school bus and a taxi pass by under the shade of street trees. The camera then approaches a busy intersection marked by a large yellow parking garage and a traffic light, pausing briefly as a woman in a black dress runs across the crosswalk. Finally, the view transitions as the character crosses the street and ascends a steeply inclined sidewalk past a graffiti-covered brick building toward a distant overpass.
